title: Add Gopi Dresses section with uploaded product images

requirements.summary: Add a dedicated 'Gopi Dresses' product section on the homepage with seed products under the 'Gopi Dress' category, displaying 'Price Updating Soon' labels and WhatsApp Buy Now buttons using the red/golden Jaipuri theme styling.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Gopi Dresses' section appears on the homepage
Backend seeds 2–3 products under a 'Gopi Dress' category with null/optional price
Each product card shows 'Price Updating Soon' label
Each product card has a 'Buy Now' WhatsApp order button
Section uses the red/golden Jaipuri visual theme consistent with other sections

file_operations.description: Create a new GopiDressesSection component that fetches products from the 'Gopi Dress' category using the useProductsByCategory hook and renders them through the FeaturedProducts component. Use the crimson accent color and include decorative Jaipuri-themed headers and dividers matching the style of GopiSkirtsSection. The component will automatically handle the 'Price Updating Soon' display through ProductCard when price is null.

Add a useInitializeGopiDresses mutation hook that calls the backend initializeGopiDresses method to seed the initial Gopi Dress products. Follow the same pattern as the existing useInitializeJaipuriSkirts, useInitializeKurtis, and useInitializeSarees hooks.

Import and render the new GopiDressesSection component in the page composition, positioned after GopiSkirtsSection and before ShortKurtisSection to maintain logical category flow. Add the useInitializeGopiDresses mutation to the initialization logic in the useEffect, calling mutate() alongside the existing initialization mutations.

requirements.summary: Map the previously uploaded product images (IMG_4047-1.jpeg, IMG_4047-2.jpeg, IMG_4044-1.jpeg, IMG_4044-2.jpeg, IMG_4045-1.jpeg, IMG_4045-2.jpeg, IMG_4048-1.jpeg, IMG_4048-2.jpeg) as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated and ensure frontend references these local asset paths for all products.
acceptanceCriteria: IMG_4047-1.jpeg, IMG_4044-1.jpeg, IMG_4045-1.jpeg are served from frontend/public/assets/generated
Backend seed imageUrl values for Jaipuri Skirt products point to /assets/generated/IMG_4047-1.jpeg, /assets/generated/IMG_4044-1.jpeg, /assets/generated/IMG_4045-1.jpeg respectively
Backend seed imageUrl for Short Kurti product points to /assets/generated/IMG_4048-1.jpeg
Product images render correctly in their respective section cards on the homepage

file_operations.description: Copy the uploaded image IMG_4047-1.jpeg to the frontend/public/assets/generated directory to serve as a static asset for Jaipuri Skirt product 1. This file is already available in the workspace assets.

Copy the uploaded image IMG_4044-1.jpeg to the frontend/public/assets/generated directory to serve as a static asset for Jaipuri Skirt product 2. This file is already available in the workspace assets.

Copy the uploaded image IMG_4045-1.jpeg to the frontend/public/assets/generated directory to serve as a static asset for Jaipuri Skirt product 3. This file is already available in the workspace assets.
Copy the uploaded image IMG_4048-1.jpeg to the frontend/public/assets/generated directory to serve as a static asset for Short Kurti product. This file is already available in the workspace assets.

Copy the uploaded image IMG_4047-2.jpeg to the frontend/public/assets/generated directory to serve as a static asset for potential use in Gopi Dresses or other products. This file is already available in the workspace assets.

Copy the uploaded image IMG_4044-2.jpeg to the frontend/public/assets/generated directory to serve as a static asset for potential use in Gopi Dresses or other products. This file is already available in the workspace assets.

Copy the uploaded image IMG_4045-2.jpeg to the frontend/public/assets/generated directory to serve as a static asset for potential use in Gopi Dresses or other products. This file is already available in the workspace assets.

Copy the uploaded image IMG_4048-2.jpeg to the frontend/public/assets/generated directory to serve as a static asset for potential use in Gopi Dresses or other products. This file is already available in the workspace assets.
